mapper.select: select package_id, package_name, price, duration_days, benefit_list, status, sort_no from member_packages where package_id = #{packageId} and deleted = false
mapper.update: update member_packages set package_name = #{packageName}, price = #{price}, duration_days = #{durationDays}, benefit_list = #{benefitList, typeHandler=com.studylib.common.persistence.typehandler.CommaSeparatedStringListTypeHandler}, status = #{status}, sort_no = #{sortNo}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, deleted = #{deleted} where package_id = #{packageId} and deleted = false
